---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement for the task manager
title: "Feature: "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Goal

Describe the feature or improvement.

## Why It Matters

Explain the problem this solves or the workflow it improves.

## Suggested Approach

Describe how this could work from a user's point of view.

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] The feature works from the interactive CLI.
- [ ] Invalid input is handled clearly.
- [ ] README usage examples are updated if needed.
